A subdivision of [[CoMar Combat Systems/Legends|CoMar Combat Systems]], '''Bryn & Gweith''' manufactured several [[Missile/Legends|missile]]-based weapon systems, including the [[Leveler I]] [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launcher]],<ref name="ISB" /> the [[Mounted MPTL 17]] [[Proton torpedo launcher/Legends|proton torpedo launcher]], and the [[Multi-Purpose Missile Bank XVI]].<ref name="HS" />
